questionHtml: Cell X is replaced by a second cell of identical emf E but with internal resistance 2.0 Ω. Comment on the length of AC for which the current in the second cell is zero.
markschemeHtml:
since the current in the cell is still zero there is no potential drop across the internal resistance

and so the length would be the same

 

OWTTE

[2 marks]
